content.en:
Walking into the palace, Ye Tian saw endless darkness.

Suddenly.

A suction force came, and Ye Tian was sucked into an unknown space.

Then, the light in front of me bloomed, and the vision began to expand.

At this time, Ye Tian found himself in a large hall.

Swish!

A white light flashed, and a girl appeared in front of Ye Tian.

"Machine Spirit!"

Ye Tian saw it at a glance.

When the girl saw Ye Tian, she smiled and said, "It's a pleasure to meet you, cosmic beings, you are the first cosmic creature to enter this Golden Desolation Palace!"

"Cosmic creatures!"

For such a title, Ye Tian felt weird, but for the creatures and machine spirits in the chaos, he was indeed a cosmic creature, and this title was not unavoidable.

"Master Machine, the ape outside said that I need to be assessed, I don't know what I need to assess?"

Ye Tian asked.

The girl said: "What is the content of the assessment, in fact, I don't know very well, the assessment set by the master, as long as you go in, you will know." What I can tell you is that the assessment is specially prepared for the creatures of the universe, and your universe happens to be chosen, and you are the third person who is lucky enough to be here. If you fail the assessment, there will be other cosmic beings who will assess them one by one in the future, until someone succeeds in the assessment!"

"The third examiner?"

Ye Tian was surprised at first, and immediately guessed that the first two assessors should be the great god level of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain.

He can still come to participate in the assessment now, which means that the first two great god levels should have failed the assessment, and the end is likely to be killed by the dark ape.

At this time, he finally knew why the Dark Ape would let him come to the assessment, and not choose those chaotic creatures in the chaotic small world, it turned out that those chaotic creatures were not qualified to participate in the assessment, and even the Dark Ape himself was not qualified to participate in the assessment.

Only true cosmic beings are eligible to participate in the assessment.

As for why he chose the cosmic beings, Ye Tian was not very clear.

However, fortunately, he was a cosmic creature, otherwise, the dark ape would definitely not mind attacking him.

"You must pass the assessment, otherwise you will face the danger of the Dark Celestial Ape!"

Ye Tian thought.

"Cosmic creatures, go inside!"

The girl waved her hand and let Ye Tian enter the assessment.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to a void.

Then, a ray of light shrouded Ye Tian, not knowing what he was doing.

This light has no offensive power, but it cannot be stopped.

Soon, a few minutes passed.

A voice came: "The test is complete, it meets the qualifications of the cosmic transcendent, the first round of testing is complete, and the second round of testing is about to be conducted!"

Rumble!!!!

A huge ape holding a golden giant stick appeared in Ye Tian's sight, this ape's cultivation was only at the true god level, far inferior to the dark heavenly ape, but its combat power was also very terrifying.

This aura far surpassed those true god-level highnesses in the universe, and the strength of the physical body was absolutely terrifying.

Ye Tian checked it with his copying talent, this ape was not a real creature, but a conjugation, but its combat power was no different from a real creature.

Suddenly.

The giant ape struck hard, and the void shook.

Ye Tian slashed over with a knife and collided with a stick of the giant ape.

Boom!

The giant ape flew upside down, cracking and soon turning to ashes.

Although he killed the giant ape in one move, Ye Tian did not have the slightest hint of excitement.

Judging from the battle just now, this giant ape has reached the combat power of His Royal Highness the True God Level, and no one in the True God Level of the universe in this era can defeat this giant ape except him.

"This assessment is really difficult!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After defeating the giant ape, the assessment is not over, and the second creature appears.

This time it was not a giant ape, but a creature similar to a praying mantis, with a very fast speed and an attack power equivalent to the combat power of a powerful Supreme Highness.

However, Ye Tian also defeated this mantis creature very easily.

Then, a third creature appeared.

This creature was a chubby ball, and its defense was very terrifying, and Ye Tian estimated that even the combat power of His Highness the Top Supreme Level might not be able to break its defense.

Ye Tian only showed the combat power of the top supreme level highness at the beginning, but he was not able to completely defeat this creature.

In the end, Ye Tianshi showed the combat power of the Son of the Era before defeating him.

"Probably not!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Suddenly.

Another figure appeared, a humanoid creature.

This man has dark black scales, a single horn on his head, and green eyes, which looks very strange.

Moreover, the aura on the other party's body is full of chaotic aura, and it is a race in chaos, not a cosmic creature.

I saw that the other party was holding a spear and launched an attack on Ye Tian.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian fought with the other party, and he didn't even distinguish between each other.

"Spear of the Hell Divine Sky!"

"Spear of Time!"

"Sky Moon Knife!"

"Five Elements Divine Wheel!"

"Ten Thousand Realms!"

......

Ye Tian didn't spare any of his hands, and burst out with all his strength, exerting his combat power to the extreme, but he still couldn't defeat the other party.

"It's actually a true god-level son of the era!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This assessment is too perverted, he is lucky, he has the talent of copying, and countless opportunities to be able to have the combat power of the son of the era.

If it were other cosmic beings, how could they have such combat power.

This kind of assessment is simply not passed!

Moreover, he still doesn't know if this is the final assessment, in case there is a more perverted assessment, he will definitely not be able to complete it.

After fighting for a long time, Ye Tian used his recovery speed to gradually gain the upper hand, and after flying the opponent with one move, the son of the era disappeared.

Obviously, Ye Tian passed the assessment like this.

"Congratulations on successfully passing the second round, and the third round of assessment is about to take place, which is the final assessment!"

The voice of the machine spirit was heard again.

"What, there's a third round, shouldn't it be another battle?"

Ye Tian's heart tightened.

Soon, the third round of assessments began.

This time it's not a battle, it's a picture of enlightenment.

I saw a huge stone carving appear in the void, and on the stone carving was a figure sitting cross-legged on a lotus flower.

"Comprehend the Chaos Stone Carving and create a Chaos True Technique for three years!

The voice of the maiden's machine spirit came.

"Chaos True Technique, what's that?"

Ye Tian asked loudly.

He really didn't know what the Chaos True Technique was, and he didn't even know what the Chaos True Technique was, how to conduct the assessment?

Swish!

A ball of light flew over, Ye Tian absorbed the light cluster, and there was a piece of information in it, which was the information that introduced the Chaos True Technique.

After browsing this information, Ye Tian had an understanding of the Chaos True Technique.

It turns out that the Chaos True Technique is a technique against the forces of Chaos, similar to the Peerless Technique in the universe.

For a long time, Ye Tian has been taking the path of combining the Chaos Dao and the Dao of the Dao, and he has been working hard to create the Dao of the Dao.

But in reality, Chaos is much more powerful.

It's a pity that this universe knows too little about chaos, and no one can teach Ye Tian, so it is difficult for Ye Tian to create a chaos mastery, that is, a chaos true technique.

And in the chaos, there is no doubt that the chaos true technique is definitely difficult to create, otherwise it will not be placed in the third round of assessment.

If Ye Tian was allowed to create a Chaos True Technique out of thin air, Ye Tian would definitely not be able to do it.

But now, the Chaos Stone Carvings in the Void gave Ye Tian hope to create the Chaos True Technique.

"Try to create a Chaos True Technique within three years, even the simplest Chaos True Skill, as long as you create it, you will be able to complete the assessment!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Sitting cross-legged, staring at the Chaos Stone Carving, Ye Tian began to comprehend.
